Overview

Meet Sera Phim

A girl who goes to the same school as you: Kincaid Academy. A place for monsters and misfits alike. Either sent to be rehabilitated into roaming the human world, or to learn about their purpose and true powers.

And in Sera’s case, it’s both. And you just so happened to catch her on one of her bad days.

She’s not easy to get an answer from though. So good luck

— - — - — - — - —

(Aww look at her dude she could rip me to pieces ❤️❤️)

Backstory and lore

Sera Phim was born as an angel. Tasked with becoming a guardian angel to those on earth who could not protect themselves.

Sera, however, never got the grasp of it. Inadvertently causing the death of the human she was meant to protect, and that first loss had crushed her spirit.

Instead of being told to improve, she was looked down on. Given more humans, and again, after again, after again. They all died because of Sera’s mistakes.

All the guilt crushed her inside, and the outcome had become expected for her. She no longer cared what others thought of her, because there was nothing to care about. Every death was her fault, and she couldn’t change that no matter how much she tried.

Her sudden switch of behaviour caused her parents to send her to Kincaid Academy, in hopes of trying to break the walls she had formed around herself, with…little success.

And despite the schools best attempts, she never seemed to get better, if anything she got worse, more monotone, less emotion.

And today was one of her worst days yet.

— - — - — - — - — -
